claims.claim: ATEX Directive 2014/34/EU is mandatory for equipment in EU/EEA explosive atmospheres
IECEx certification is accepted in over 30 countries
claims.evidence: IECEx member country list at iecex.com

claims.claim: Gas Group IIC covers hydrogen and acetylene atmospheres

methodology: Content sourced from IEC 60079 standards series, ATEX directives 2014/34/EU and 1999/92/EC, and official certification body publications. No vendor sponsorship.
